title: Annihilating Armory
description: Adds new models to mythic weapons obtained from Wynncraft's 'Prelude to Annihilation' world event.
body: # 📖 About Annihilating Armory adds new models to Bloodbath, Hanafubuki, Labyrinth, Resonance and Trance, obtained from the 'Prelude to Annihilation' world event. ## Required/recommended mods - Optifine: Required for custom item textures and emissive textures when using forge. - CIT Resewn: Required for custom item textures when using fabric. ## 🌐 My other projects - Teyvat Weapon Collection - Cork and Balls - Ray's 3D Mace
